name: specorator-obsidian-mcp
description: In-process MCP server exposing the Obsidian vault as a typed agent tool surface.

scripts.build: npm run build:catalog && tsc --noEmit && node esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.verify: npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run validate:manifest
scripts.version: node scripts/version-bump.js && node scripts/validate-manifest.js && git add manifest.json versions.json
